summary: High‑fidelity soundboard capture of an energetic spring‑tour show with standout percussion jam, Bob’s guitar flourishes and Donna Jean’s full‑throttle vocals.
review: The recording is praised for its crystal‑clear fidelity and punchy drum mix, delivering a vivid listening experience. The performance shines in the extended percussion segment, powerful Truckin' drive and a full‑body rendition of Playing In The Band, though one reviewer felt Garcia’s vocal was lackluster that night.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong consensus on excellent recording quality and several standout musical moments; a single mixed review about Garcia lowers the overall show rating slightly.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Great fidelity, crisp mix, punchy drums described as "artillery" and clear percussion throughout; no reported drop‑outs or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The show builds a lively groove early and culminates in an extended percussion jam at the end, keeping the energy high despite occasional vocal slur from Garcia.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Joins the late‑show percussion segment, adding drums alongside the rest of the band; some note his guitar work was less adventurous.
band_member_comments.Bob: Provides “nice flourishes” on rhythm guitar that reviewers highlight positively.
band_member_comments.Drums: Described as having a powerful, artillery‑like punch and driving the overall high energy of the performance.
